description: The 'payment-processor' deployment in the 'finance' namespace is stuck in a CrashLoopBackOff. It simulates a legacy application where the current livenessProbe kills the process prematurely during initialization. Implement the startupProbe, updated livenessProbe, readinessProbe, and preStop hook requirements specified in /home/ga/Desktop/lifecycle_spec.yaml to stabilize the deployment. Do not modify the container's command or args. Access the environment via Rancher at https://localhost (admin / Admin12345678!).
